panels.description: Shows the delta between expected and ready Deployments in the selected cluster. Any non-zero value satisfies the alert condition.
panels.title: DeploymentReplicasMismatch

panels.description: Shows the delta between expected and ready Statefulsets in the selected cluster. Any non-zero value satisfies the alert condition.
panels.title: StatefulSetReplicasMismatch

panels.description: Displays HTTP response codes from the products. Includes both external "fqdn" checks and kuberenetes "internal" service URL checks. A value of 200 means everything is OK.
panels.title: Healthchecks

panels.description: Loki ingester has experienced WAL disk full failures. This indicates storage issues with the Loki WAL directory.
panels.title: Loki WAL Disk Full Failures

panels.description: No metrics have been received from workload cluster. This could indicate Alloy is not running, network issues between the workload and control room, or the workload cluster is down.
panels.title: Workload Metrics Silent

panels.description: RDS instance CPU utilization is above 80% for more than 10 minutes.
panels.title: RDS CPU Utilization High

panels.description: RDS instance has less than 5 GiB of free storage space remaining.
panels.title: RDS Free Storage Low

panels.description: RDS instance has less than 512 MiB of freeable memory remaining for more than 10 minutes.
panels.title: RDS Freeable Memory Low

panels.description: RDS instance has more than 80 active database connections for more than 5 minutes.
panels.title: RDS Database Connections High

panels.description: Application Load Balancer has more than 10 target 5XX errors for over 5 minutes, indicating backend service failures.
panels.title: ALB Target 5XX Errors High

panels.description: Application Load Balancer has unhealthy targets for over 5 minutes, indicating backend service health issues.
panels.title: ALB Unhealthy Targets

panels.description: Network Load Balancer has unhealthy targets for over 5 minutes, indicating backend service health issues.
panels.title: NLB Unhealthy Targets

panels.description: Application Load Balancer target response time is above 2 seconds for more than 10 minutes, indicating performance degradation.
panels.title: ALB Response Latency High
